display_name: GLM-4.7 is a next-generation general-purpose model optimized for coding, reasoning, and agentic workflows, delivering strong gains in multilingual software engineering, tool use, and complex problem s
description:
GLM-4.7 is a next-generation general-purpose model optimized for coding, reasoning, and agentic workflows, delivering strong gains in multilingual software engineering, tool use, and complex problem solving. It introduces advanced thinking controls—interleaved, preserved, and turn-level thinking—to improve stability on long-horizon, multi-turn tasks. Supported context length: 198k tokens. More information: https://app.fireworks.ai/models/fireworks/glm-4p7

Supported file format: jpg, jpeg, png, heic, pdf, python, xlsx
